name: The Grinch
description: Dr. Seuss's classic Christmas-stealer across the 1957 book, 1966 special, 2000 live-action film, and 2018 animated feature

questions.q: Who wrote the 1957 children's book How the Grinch Stole Christmas!?

source.notes: Pen name of Theodor Seuss Geisel.

questions.q: Where does the Grinch live, high above Whoville?

source.notes: Snowy peak overlooking the town of Whoville.

questions.q: What is the name of the Grinch's loyal dog?

source.notes: Gets roped into pulling the Grinch's sleigh.

questions.q: What is the name of the little Who girl who changes the Grinch's mind about Christmas?

source.notes: Seuss describes her as 'no more than two.'

questions.q: By how many sizes does the Grinch's heart famously grow at the story's end?

source.notes: 'His heart grew three sizes that day.'

questions.q: Which 2018 Illumination animated film revived the character with Benedict Cumberbatch voicing the Grinch?

source.notes: Grossed $540 million worldwide.

questions.q: Who plays the Grinch in Ron Howard's 2000 live-action film?

source.notes: Carrey endured hours of makeup daily for the role.

questions.q: Who directed the 2000 live-action How the Grinch Stole Christmas?

source.notes: Also directed A Beautiful Mind and Apollo 13.

questions.q: Who narrates the 1966 animated TV special How the Grinch Stole Christmas!?

source.notes: Best known for playing Frankenstein's monster in the 1931 film.

questions.q: Who actually performs 'You're a Mean One, Mr. Grinch' in the 1966 special?

source.notes: Ravenscroft was also the voice of Tony the Tiger.

questions.q: Who narrates the 2018 Illumination animated film?

source.notes: Also contributed original music.

questions.q: Which composer scored the 2018 Illumination film?

source.notes: Frequent Tim Burton collaborator.

questions.q: Which rapper/producer recorded 'I Am the Grinch' for the 2018 soundtrack?

source.notes: He also reworked 'You're a Mean One, Mr. Grinch.'

questions.q: Who plays the glamorous Martha May Whovier in Ron Howard's 2000 film?

source.notes: Later of The Good Wife and The Gilded Age.

questions.q: Who plays the officious Mayor Augustus MayWho in the 2000 live-action film?

source.notes: Also known for Arrested Development and Transparent.

questions.q: Which young actress played Cindy Lou Who in the 2000 Jim Carrey film?

source.notes: Later became the lead singer of the rock band The Pretty Reckless.

questions.q: In the 2018 film, what is the name of the oversized reindeer the Grinch recruits for his sleigh?

source.notes: Ultimately reunites with his reindeer family.

questions.q: Which British actor voices the Grinch in the 2018 Illumination film?

source.notes: Used an American accent for the role.

questions.q: Which animation studio produced the 2018 Grinch?

source.notes: Also behind Despicable Me and Minions.

questions.q: Approximately how many computer-generated trees are in the opening shot of the 2018 film's Whoville?

source.notes: A widely cited production fact during the film's promotion.

questions.q: What are the names of Cindy Lou Who's chaotic twin baby brothers in the 2018 film?

source.notes: Adds to Cindy Lou's protective instincts over her overworked mom.

questions.q: In the 1957 book and 1966 special, how is the undersized condition of the Grinch's heart described?

source.notes: 'His heart grew three sizes' therefore gives him a larger-than-normal heart.
